title: Automation Script Review Lab Submission
description: Evidence template for reviewing a script or automation workflow before execution.

required_evidence.label: Script purpose
required_evidence.description: Explain what the script or automation is intended to do.

required_evidence.label: Risk review
required_evidence.description: Identify risky commands, assumptions, paths, credentials, or destructive operations.

required_evidence.label: Safe test plan
required_evidence.description: Explain how you would test safely before running against a real target.

required_evidence.label: Expected output
required_evidence.description: Describe the expected result before execution.

required_evidence.label: Validation plan
required_evidence.description: Explain how you would prove the script worked correctly.

required_evidence.label: Professional summary
required_evidence.description: Write a short professional review summary with approve, revise, or block recommendation.

completion_signals: student proposes a safe test plan
safety_rules: Do not submit secrets or credentials.
Do not execute unknown scripts blindly.
Use test targets or dry runs before production-like systems.
